scripts.dev:panda: bash -lc 'trap "kill 0" EXIT; panda codegen --watch & panda cssgen --watch --outfile styled-system/styles.css & wait'
scripts.dev:solid-types: bash -lc 'trap "kill 0" EXIT; pnpm --filter @infernal-ui/solid run build:js --watch & pnpm --filter @infernal-ui/solid run build:types:watch & wait'
scripts.dev: bash -lc 'trap "kill 0" EXIT; pnpm run dev:panda & pnpm run dev:solid-types & pnpm run dev:vite & wait'
